description:
**Milestone:** Organisms Extraction

Move the protolabs-report results component from `apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/` to `libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/`. The dialog component stays in apps/ui because it has app-level dependencies.

## CRITICAL: Lessons from hitl-form Migration

The previous migration (hitl-form) failed CI because the agent:
1. Used `@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms` imports inside `libs/ui/` — **self-reference breaks tsup**. Use relative imports: `../../atoms/button.js`
2. Copied app-level dependencies (`@/store/*`, `@/lib/electron`) into `libs/ui/` — **libs cannot import from apps**
3. Forgot `.js` extensions on relative imports — **required by nodenext module resolution**

## Migration Rules

### What goes to organisms (`libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/`):
- `protolabs-report-results.tsx` — **presentational** (takes data as props, renders UI)
  - Change `import { Button } from '@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms'` → `import { Button } from '../../atoms/button.js'`
  - Change `import { Badge } from '@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms'` → `import { Badge } from '../../atoms/badge.js'`
  - Change `import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'` → `import { cn } from '../../lib/cn.js'`
  - Keep `import type { ... } from '@protolabs-ai/types'` (external dep, fine)
  - Keep `lucide-react` imports (already a dependency)

### What stays in apps/ui (`apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/`):
- `protolabs-report-dialog.tsx` — **connected** (uses `getElectronAPI()`, `toast`, app-level utils)
  - Update its import of results component: `import { ProtoLabsReportResults } from '@protolabs-ai/ui/organisms'`

### organisms index.ts:
- Add to `libs/ui/src/organisms/index.ts`: `export { ProtoLabsReportResults } from './protolabs-report/index.js'`

## Files to Modify
- `libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/protolabs-report-results.tsx` (MOVE + fix imports)
- `libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/index.ts` (CREATE — barrel export)
- `libs/ui/src/organisms/index.ts` (UPDATE — add re-export)
- `apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/protolabs-report-dialog.tsx` (UPDATE — import from organisms)
- `apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/index.ts` (UPDATE — keep dialog, remove results export if needed)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Results component in organisms with relative imports only
- [ ] Dialog stays in apps/ui, imports results from `@protolabs-ai/ui/organisms`
- [ ] All `.js` extensions on relative imports in organisms
- [ ] No `@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms` self-references in organisms code
- [ ] No `@/` app-level imports in organisms code
- [ ] `npm run build:packages` passes (tsup builds organisms)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
title: Migrate protolabs-report to organisms

descriptionHistory.description:
**Milestone:** Organisms Extraction

Move the protolabs-report directory (dialog, results, index components) from apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/ to libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/. Export from organisms index. Update all import paths. Run typecheck to verify no broken imports.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/
- libs/ui/src/organisms/index.ts
- apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] protolabs-report components moved to libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/
- [ ] Old apps/ui/shared/protolabs-report/ directory removed
- [ ] All import paths updated
- [ ] npm run typecheck passes
- [ ] Tech debt table updated — UI package gaps marked complete

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.

**Milestone:** Organisms Extraction

Move the protolabs-report results component from `apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/` to `libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/`. The dialog component stays in apps/ui because it has app-level dependencies.

## CRITICAL: Lessons from hitl-form Migration

The previous migration (hitl-form) failed CI because the agent:
1. Used `@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms` imports inside `libs/ui/` — **self-reference breaks tsup**. Use relative imports: `../../atoms/button.js`
2. Copied app-level dependencies (`@/store/*`, `@/lib/electron`) into `libs/ui/` — **libs cannot import from apps**
3. Forgot `.js` extensions on relative imports — **required by nodenext module resolution**

## Migration Rules

### What goes to organisms (`libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/`):
- `protolabs-report-results.tsx` — **presentational** (takes data as props, renders UI)
  - Change `import { Button } from '@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms'` → `import { Button } from '../../atoms/button.js'`
  - Change `import { Badge } from '@protolabs-ai/ui/atoms'` → `import { Badge } from '../../atoms/badge.js'`
  - Change `import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'` → `import { cn } from '../../lib/cn.js'`
  - Keep `import type { ... } from '@protolabs-ai/types'` (external dep, fine)
  - Keep `lucide-react` imports (already a dependency)

### What stays in apps/ui (`apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/`):
- `protolabs-report-dialog.tsx` — **connected** (uses `getElectronAPI()`, `toast`, app-level utils)
  - Update its import of results component: `import { ProtoLabsReportResults } from '@protolabs-ai/ui/organisms'`

### organisms index.ts:
- Add to `libs/ui/src/organisms/index.ts`: `export { ProtoLabsReportResults } from './protolabs-report/index.js'`

## Files to Modify
- `libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/protolabs-report-results.tsx` (MOVE + fix imports)
- `libs/ui/src/organisms/protolabs-report/index.ts` (CREATE — barrel export)
- `libs/ui/src/organisms/index.ts` (UPDATE — add re-export)
- `apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/protolabs-report-dialog.tsx` (UPDATE — import from organisms)
- `apps/ui/src/components/shared/protolabs-report/index.ts` (UPDATE — keep dialog, remove results export if needed)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Results component in organisms with relative imports only
- [ ] Dialog stays in apps/ui, imports results from `@protolabs-ai/ui/organisms`
